subject: Joe, take the next step by customizing your Google Account
body_text:
Let's get started, Joe

Welcome to Google. Your new account comes with access to Google products, apps, and services.

Here are a few tips to get you started.


Get the most out of your Google Account

We'll send you personalized tips, news and recommendations from Google.

Yes, keep me updated <https://notifications.google.com/g/p/AKWoLQioneiOii2GEIFiceANBfXQlqRElC9pDE09oldx_FRk2nWjlEmW5DtEW8tbQA-McIih25zc9CCZdMuIQE3H4WJoexEjww0I5RaCZF0sZj1uBqdjgmpQ05DwYTQDuCVV6PP78cuOy5drRpxWR47384SJRGWScMZuJfdzOGgNcTkbqBkbJtBdsBcKbU0YvliMtsOyLmS97jH33PI7gj3FfSji_0uooK-LrJPMcv1_chVunYiq62LY5fTrTYGFvGBtf0_RqHSTEQaOQd7E8ql_F3go7H7WkfxBfnGl2a-K_muNdDJURGfaW9BvEsfizIpa_WQAnQqq_tUtgxY>


Stay in the know with the Google app

Find quick answers, explore your interests, and stay up to date.

Try it <https://notifications.google.com/g/p/AKWoLQg8rRm45PYofJ8X2y7_wgG6JFshmC7K69QSK1rDuKrnB7lg8NMo0JGQDBr9r0vV2Xxu039x5mtrrHZxCz0IKu5gy8BsuJaWhNw5DSszeLPxqkycteoatQU5wiPVW3kJx97jKk9lI2yRXvWXdBci0elV7D4PJb9JC2-T20ORlbzB7epDARDeCu0qIjHmL9w1qZCKRT17aJxeNX9MBJwQ5tOX3TmFCo-zI5ACOnypY1XB-qLN5Tm1TPKliqtQq1jcKL05-mqH>

Google Play

Find apps and games you love.

Go to Google Play <https://notifications.google.com/g/p/AKWoLQijcs6Sq6l58FKXm-uqDkGPgxVNZw542jHzl7bVNbB8xkHUpLDoCLzelY7JgIZvnx-dy9pZOoZBXC7s7rM-rl0Z_9J6vrQ-VcTFs7gnCeQBwIFV5FSulueOBiJAcf4s0eH8cxUxOI2Ao84WPVzwrmTgA20zb0USpDwqy6kTO8idjZjPgR3geJhE0mW1j98CAsQFi12jp6OB7tQmowwnwLewi60rnkGcAVRfc9IiS1k6piDu7F_D5GFbsc42zFJ->

Confirm your options are right for you

Review and change your privacy and security options to make Google work better for you.

Confirm <https://notifications.google.com/g/p/AKWoLQirCsob2piNo7ke2Hb1hSCpl1lWJu2JQ-iMc0rvYfyERSohAK3ht7dxvOOfijYQTljfDe2Z7NNS-9i_kyFJKfuYToLckyJUCZh1Z0LQx0JAfbv0D6ziO_5vdE3UzJxwJX0YVMDCFGxnc--KKbyjOi1FK4dRImzD3bxXTa88TV4LhZuPlW1AaFjepcbTP9BhDZgi9lXKoHQlVXHwkm_3S3wtkwA6jYKxRaA>

Find your phone

Pinpoint your phone's location <https://notifications.google.com/g/p/AKWoLQgkAbM5l-0rlU_bY-ilCCcMs3ulSdbflW3rK29yDjg_rVzr5pbf7mNXqCCFSEbVf75jFA7EF9_aJE8L_7HDXsThk3K6PK3Rc_eKQ_3iAVmyIWlqSx2yTkwlS46nhwjvisijpSoa_RHTgpaIaRNdoI8v9EfcVjOihkTnLBTVdBQSqlnGieHUIxoEDPA6sMqIyHq0ry908rvj> and secure it with Find My Device.

Find answers

Visit the Help Center <https://notifications.google.com/g/p/AKWoLQg_6OVxRisF0Loo2y13sMu6G60uHA4Wc2EOEf7rUTVbCQNctAEQXPFwU2EbN37lxWQwHeJDvOILgTHF-p2dTOAOHtGC0USDZIhXwau-BREGR2JvIrq4dR7f5R0jJoBezecRQgw7yJqXbxtppjB6TlKmnGdKQULtVRXRI7gfLrzaedXuMHADwcST8NwywafEfzflYIl3_g> to learn all about your new Google Account.

Replies to this email aren't monitored. If you have a question about your new account, the Help Center <https://notifications.google.com/g/p/AKWoLQiPnosvvmQNeKQKYooUuwLUsTos4YzpjfNA8svrUPCQcIml2yjMQV-k66o1lHatQpfWBwCFv2RMX7gHI_9pWnDCf1jS6yfm2pkNCp_F1O4Ruc0M0TPTeftB5gQSYYhvQ_pAPs1NaQnUOZVOEC0bx1gEsTWg7naJtL1lztkOakLoAZqSpmPTqi7NgilVGhkOlz3VkWWpn8KvTmaNNw> likely has the answer you're looking for.



Google LLC 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043

subject: Welcome to Kik! Confirm your details inside...
body_text:
​WELCOME TO KIK!
Kik lets you connect with friends, groups and the world around you through chat.
​
COMPLETE YOUR SIGN-UP:
For the best experience on Kik, you'll need to confirm your email address. Here's what you registered with:
Username - coomgoomer
​
Open the link below to confirm your email and complete your sign up:
​
https://ws.kik.com/c?k=guD7jEshzxtYmTU4ZId_mAnGN-a_Mfrv0ckJzsjxKiYlTCJgZkiHiRFVA-NP5SEHQfDEbrjNm_yyqDCTJJvLjA
​
Want to find your friends on Kik? Here's how:
Find your friends that are using Kik - http://help.kik.com/entries/104601106
Tell your friends about Kik - http://help.kik.com/entries/87926066
​
GOT A QUESTION?
You can check out our Help Center at http://help.kik.com.
The best way to stay up-to-date with the latest Kik news is to like us on Facebook or follow us on Twitter.
​
Thanks!
​
- The Kik Team
___
Follow Kik on Twitter: http://twitter.com/kik
Follow Kik on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/kik/
Like Kik on Facebook: http://www.facebook.com/kikapp
​
Didn't sign up for Kik? Please open the link below to remove your email address from our system. Sorry about that!
​
https://ws.kik.com/n?k=guD7jEshzxtYmTU4ZId_mMuIuOBPmf3ZcKg8GsyTLk5LzbG1gVZiuBv_q5kiiJ9E1Q5E7UJivpLWSMhkHsws_ck9Oz99TYasfQ9RKG-HZ79pRZKQdtO2uqOzhVhfNzNV
​
© Kik Interactive Inc., 2019. All rights reserved. | http://www.kik.com
1222 6th St. Santa Monica, CA 90401, USA
​
Open the link below to take your email address off our mailing list for marketing emails and updates.
​
https://ws.kik.com/e?k=4PcGYZ5SP75IpHmEaCzCOkcJpE0r4RS7WgdAklPDVtY0JuDJNIFjWgfBIJh0uCuTy1nnt5DIFAfyaG69m0hfPVmLopgxfO20KQCub0qyN_iZdzm2jvlNHydNdOqah5c3
​
You'll still be able to receive any emails you request from us, like password resets.
body_html:
Welcome to Kik!
Kik lets you connect with friends, groups and the world around you through chat.
It’s a good idea to confirm your email address. This ensures you can recover your account if you ever forget your password.

Your username is: coomgoomer
Confirm Email
What can you do on Kik?

Start Chatting

Send pics, videos, and GIFs

Chat with Bots

Play games, shop, discover videos

Kik Codes

Scan to add friends and join groups

Personalize

Custom chat bubble colors and smileys

Confirm Email
Need help? Check out help.kik.com

Didn’t sign up for Kik? Click here to remove your email from our systems.
© Kik Interactive Inc., 2019. All rights reserved.
kik.com | 1222 6th St. Santa Monica, CA 90401, USA
Click here to take your email address off our mailing list for marketing emails and updates. 
You’ll still be able to receive any emails you request from us, like password resets.
